SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Crafting Oklahoma City, One Project at a Time

Valles Carpentry LLC was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide honest, dependable carpentry services to our neighbors in Oklahoma City. What started as a small operation has grown into a trusted name, thanks to our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

We believe in doing things the right way, every time. From the initial consultation to the final nail, we prioritize clear communication, meticulous attention to detail, and a dedication to exceeding your expectations. We're not just building structures; we're building relationships.

As a locally owned and operated business, we're deeply invested in the Oklahoma City community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local charities, and strive to contribute to the growth and prosperity of our vibrant city.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Valles Carpentry LLC

Experienced Craftsmen

Our team brings years of expertise to every project, ensuring exceptional results.

Reliable Service

We're committed to being on time, staying on budget, and delivering on our promises.

Quality Materials

We use only the finest materials to ensure durability and lasting beauty.

Customer Satisfaction

Your happiness is our top priority. We're not satisfied until you are.

Ready to Start Your Project?

Contact Valles Carpentry today for a free consultation and estimate.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Valles Carpentry built the most beautiful custom cabinets for our kitchen remodel. The quality is outstanding, and they really listened to what we wanted. The installation was smooth and professional. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Custom Cabinets
“

Our deck was in rough shape after the winter. Valles Carpentry came out and repaired the damaged boards quickly and efficiently. The price was fair, and the work was excellent.

David K. Deck Repair
“

We needed a new fence for our backyard, and Valles Carpentry did a fantastic job. The fence looks great, provides the privacy we wanted, and was installed with care. Very happy with their service.

Jessica L. Fence Installation
“

Valles Carpentry installed crown molding throughout our home, and it looks amazing. The attention to detail was impressive, and the finished product is beautiful. They were professional and courteous throughout the entire process.

Robert P. Trim and Molding
“

We had Valles Carpentry install a new front door, and we're very pleased with the results. The door is secure, energy-efficient, and looks great. The installation was quick and professional.

Emily S. Door Installation
“

Valles Carpentry repaired some wood rot around our windows, and they did an excellent job. The repair was seamless, and they took the time to properly seal the area to prevent future rot. Highly recommend their services.

Michael B. Wood Rot Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What types of wood do you use for custom cabinets?
We offer a wide variety of wood options, including oak, maple, cherry, and walnut. We can also work with other materials upon request.
How long does it take to get custom cabinets installed?
The timeline depends on the complexity of the project, but typically it takes 4-6 weeks from design to installation.
Do you offer cabinet refacing services?
Yes, we offer cabinet refacing as a more budget-friendly alternative to full cabinet replacement.
